message:
feat: per-pane memory budget enforcement with cgroups v2 (wa-3kxe.2)

Linux: cgroups v2 per-pane hierarchy (memory.max, memory.high, memory.current)
macOS: advisory budget tracking via ps RSS + vm_stat pressure monitoring
Platform abstraction with graceful no-op fallback. 35 tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
